title: crotalaria mollii
intro: Crotalaria mollii, also known as the soft rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. Traditionally, Crotalaria mollii has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions, which are made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water.
